title: Logistics Analysts
description: Analyze product delivery or supply chain processes to identify or recommend changes. May manage route activity including invoicing, electronic bills, and shipment tracing.

tasks.text: Maintain databases of logistics information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remotely monitor the flow of vehicles or inventory, using Web-based logistics information systems to track vehicles or containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Communicate with or monitor service providers, such as ocean carriers, air freight forwarders, global consolidators, customs brokers, or trucking companies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Track product flow from origin to final delivery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret data on logistics elements, such as availability, maintainability, reliability, supply chain management, strategic sourcing or distribution, supplier management, or transportation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend improvements to existing or planned logistics processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply analytic methods or tools to understand, predict, or control logistics operations or processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare reports on logistics performance measures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Enter logistics-related data into databases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide ongoing analyses in areas such as transportation costs, parts procurement, back orders, or delivery processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze logistics data, using methods such as data mining, data modeling, or cost or benefit analysis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor inventory transactions at warehouse facilities to assess receiving, storage, shipping, or inventory integrity.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Maintain logistics records in accordance with corporate policies.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Contact carriers for rates or schedules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage systems to ensure that pricing structures adequately reflect logistics costing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with logistics management teams to determine ways to optimize service levels, maintain supply-chain efficiency, or minimize cost.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compute reporting metrics, such as on-time delivery rates, order fulfillment rates, or inventory turns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify opportunities for inventory reductions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review procedures, such as distribution or inventory management, to ensure maximum efficiency or minimum cost.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or maintain models for logistics uses, such as cost estimating or demand forecasting.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor industry standards, trends, or practices to identify developments in logistics planning or execution.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write or revise standard operating procedures for logistics processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reorganize shipping schedules to consolidate loads, maximize vehicle usage, or limit the movement of empty vehicles or containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Contact potential vendors to determine material availability.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or maintain payment systems to ensure accuracy of vendor payments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or maintain freight rate databases for use by supply chain departments to determine the most economical modes of transportation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Route or reroute drivers in real time with remote route navigation software, satellite linkup systems, or global positioning systems (GPS) to improve operational efficiencies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine packaging requirements.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Enter carbon-output or environmental-impact data into spreadsheets or environmental management or auditing software programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compare locations or environmental policies of carriers or suppliers to make transportation decisions with lower environmental impact.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for sale or lease of excess storage or transport capacity to minimize losses or inefficiencies associated with empty space.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
